name: N. Varveris-Moda Bagno S.A.
summary: N. Varveris-Moda Bagno S.A. engages in the retail trade of bathroom and kitchen products in Europe. The company offers bathroom accessories and sanitary ware; tiles; carpets; parquets; kitchen products; office and lighting products; furniture, including wardrobes, sofas, tables, beds, chairs and armchairs, and outdoor furniture; household appliances; and other accessories, as well as home and office space equipment. It primarily serves hotels, business centers, restaurants, superyachts, etc. through its Moda Bagno and Interni stores. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Vrilissia, Greece.
